      • Policies for Student Housing and Dining Services

Tercero Dining Commons

Tercero Dining Commons is a uniquely renovated space with views of south campus. Featuring multiple culinary platforms, diners at Tercero have plenty of options to satisfy any craving. Find fresh, made-to-order entrees on our signature Mongolian Wok, and enjoy wide array of seasonal pastas and entrees. Need to appease that sweet tooth? We have you covered with cookies, cakes, and pastries.

Menu

Special Meals & Events

Prices at the Door

  • $13.50 — Breakfast (7–11 AM)
  • $15.00 — Lunch (11 AM–5 PM)
  • $15.00 — Dinner (5–10 PM)

10% discount available for all guests when paying with Aggie Cash.

Eat here often? Save money with our Aggie Swipe Plus Meal Plans.

Open for Aggie Day 2026

Tercero DC will be open for Aggie Day on Saturday, April 11, 2026 from 9 AM to 2 PM.

Zone Hours on Aggie Day

Breakfast

  • Red: Closed
  • Yellow: 9–10:30 AM
  • Purple: Closed
  • Blue: 9–11 AM
  • Green: 9–11 AM

Hours

Academic Year Hours

Tuesday, September 23, 2025–Thursday, June 11, 2026.

  • Monday–Friday: 7 AM–10 PM
  • Saturday: Closed
  • Sunday: Closed
  • Holidays: 9 AM–8 PM

Scheduled Academic Year Closures

  • Thanksgiving: November 27–30, 2025;
    Meals resume with breakfast on December 1
  • Winter Break: December 13, 2025–January 4, 2026;
    Meals resume with breakfast on January 5
  • Spring Break: March 21–29, 2026;
    Meals resume with breakfast on March 30
  • End of Year: After dinner on June 11, 2026

General Manager

Dan Bodhiprasart

dbodhiprasart@ucdavis.edu

Dan's Bio

Executive Chef

Anthony Russo

amrusso@ucdavis.edu

Anthony's Bio

Location

The Tercero Dining Commons is located on the second floor of the Tercero Services Center, which is northeast of Kearney Hall and south of Sequoia Hall.

Menu Filters

Filter for Diet Preference

Select from the following filters to target dishes according to diet preference.

Filter Allergens

Select from the following filters to remove dishes containing allergens you wish to avoid.

Filters are provided to help our guests identify dishes they prefer. However, dining guests should always read the nutritional information for any dish they intend to consume to ensure its ingredients and nutrition meet their dietary requirements and goals. For more information on our allergen labeling practices, please visit our Food Allergens and Ingredients of Concern webpage.

milk or milk products, egg, soy present in other products manufactured on the same line and present on other manufacturing lines in the same plant)), blueberries (Frozen whole blueberries), strawberries (Whole strawberries), sliced pears (Canned sliced pears in juice (pears, water, pear juice concentrate)), watermelon (Fresh whole red watermelon)

Food Allergy Alert

Please be advised that our dining facilities are not certified allergy-free or certified gluten-free facilities, as other dishes served may contain major allergens. Our team makes every effort to identify ingredients that cause allergic reactions, ensure accurate labeling, and mitigate the risk for cross-contact. Additionally, manufacturers of commercial foods may change their formulation or substitute an ingredient with minimal notice. Please ensure you carefully read menu signage posted during your visit. If you have concerns about allergens, please communicate your needs with a dining manager. Residents may also consider applying to our Residential Dining Dietary Support Program.

Menu Signage and Nutrition Information

For questions and concerns, please reach out to our team at SHDS.nutrition@ucdavis.edu.

You Belong Here

Student Affairs programs and services are open to all, consistent with state and federal law as well as the University of California’s nondiscrimination policies. Every initiative—whether a student service or community event—is designed to be accessible, inclusive and respectful of all identities. To learn more, visit UC Nondiscrimination Statement or Nondiscrimination Policy Statement for University of California Publications Regarding Student-Related Matters.
